title: oxymeris sylvestris
intro: Oxymeris sylvestris, also known as the wood senna or wild senna, is a flowering plant species in the pea family, Fabaceae. The leaves and pods of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxymeris sylvestris include treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as relieving fever and reducing pain. Oxymeris sylvestris can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and pods can also be dried and used as a herbal supplement.
